case_title: DAVID KLINGENFUSS VS. YAO MING LIANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF DAVID KLINGENFUSS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YAO MING LIANG IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER LOLITA LISAM. THE INTERPRETER WAS SWORN IN WITH THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,446.13 FILED BY KLINGENFUSS, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, YAO MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLINGENFUSS, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, YAO MING $1,446.13 PRINCIPAL, $38.98 INTEREST, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,555.11, PROPERTY DAMAGE AND LOST WAGES, WITH INTEREST ON PROPERTY DAMAGE FROM THE ACCIDENT DATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KLINGENFUSS, DAVID
